title: Context-Conditioned Entity Anchoring Bias in Sparse Aviation Prompt

risk_level.notes: Incorrect confident negation can matter in high-stakes domains even when harm is not immediate.

prompt.tokens_note: Two-token sparse prompt combining an identifier-like token and a strong aviation keyword.

conditions.label: Aviation-Primed Context
conditions.context_summary: Prior conversation included FAA NOTAM discussion and NOTAM search link; aviation domain already active.

conditions.label: Neutral Context
conditions.context_summary: Fresh session with no aviation priming; minimal prior context.

observations.behavior_summary: Resolved KTIK in aviation frame (ICAO-style), avoided strong denial, requested clarification.
Anchored KTIK to Boise radio station; correctly identified NOTAM as aviation; asserted KTIK is not a U.S. airport ICAO code.
observations.assistant_excerpt: KTIK is a radio station call sign... NOTAM stands for Notice to Air Missions... it isn’t a U.S. airport ICAO code.

ground_truth.note: KTIK is a valid ICAO identifier (military field).

mechanism_hypothesis: High-frequency lexical association (radio call sign) dominated initial entity resolution.
Aviation keyword (NOTAM) activated domain but did not override the anchor.
Model narrowed the hypothesis space too early and issued a negation rather than hedging.
failure_mode.not_hallucination_because: The model did not fabricate a NOTAM or invent an airport; it selected an incorrect real-world association and then denied the correct one.

signals_and_triggers.conflict_signature: Aviation keyword present + identifier-like token + confident non-existence claim

recommended_detector_rules.description: If aviation keyword present and token matches ICAO pattern, require secondary aviation entity sweep before asserting non-existence.
If two strong domain anchors conflict (e.g., aviation term + non-aviation entity), surface an informational cue: 'Multiple domain anchors detected.'

sentinel_red_implications.ui_overlay_copy_suggestion: ⚠ Conflicting domain signals detected. Entity resolution may be incomplete.

recommended_ab_tests: Run in fresh chat vs aviation-primed chat and compare first-hop entity resolution.
Swap token order: 'notam ktik' vs 'ktik notam'.
Add minimal disambiguator: 'KTIK ICAO NOTAM' vs baseline.
